# Frameworks

Rule packs live under `src/lib/rules/frameworks/<id>/`. Each rule maps a
code pattern to a legal article, severity, and suggested fix. The single
source of truth for which packs ship is
[`src/lib/rules/frameworks/registry.ts`](../../src/lib/rules/frameworks/registry.ts).

The table below is generated from that registry and each pack manifest —
do not edit it by hand. Run `pnpm docs:generate` after changing a pack,
and `pnpm docs:check` (also enforced in CI) fails if it drifts.

## Shipped

<!-- BEGIN:frameworks-table (generated by scripts/generate-frameworks-doc.mts — do not edit by hand; run `pnpm docs:generate`) -->

| Framework                                                                       | Status  | Rules                         | Source                                                                             |
| ------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------- | ----------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [GDPR](https://gdpr-info.eu/)                                                   | Shipped | 5 (`GDPR-001`–`GDPR-005`)     | [`src/lib/rules/frameworks/gdpr/`](../../src/lib/rules/frameworks/gdpr/)           |
| [EU AI Act](https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2024/1689/oj)                     | Shipped | 5 (`AI-ACT-001`–`AI-ACT-005`) | [`src/lib/rules/frameworks/eu-ai-act/`](../../src/lib/rules/frameworks/eu-ai-act/) |
| [MiCA](https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=CELEX:32023R1114)    | Shipped | 5 (`MICA-001`–`MICA-005`)     | [`src/lib/rules/frameworks/mica/`](../../src/lib/rules/frameworks/mica/)           |
| [HIPAA](https://www.ecfr.gov/current/title-45/subtitle-A/subchapter-C/part-164) | Shipped | 5 (`HIPAA-001`–`HIPAA-005`)   | [`src/lib/rules/frameworks/hipaa/`](../../src/lib/rules/frameworks/hipaa/)         |
| [OWASP Top 10](https://owasp.org/Top10/)                                        | Shipped | 5 (`OWASP-001`–`OWASP-005`)   | [`src/lib/rules/frameworks/owasp/`](../../src/lib/rules/frameworks/owasp/)         |
| [PCI DSS](https://www.pcisecuritystandards.org/document_library/)               | Shipped | 5 (`PCI-001`–`PCI-005`)       | [`src/lib/rules/frameworks/pci-dss/`](../../src/lib/rules/frameworks/pci-dss/)     |

<!-- END:frameworks-table -->

## Planned

- SOC 2 — _contributions welcome_
- ISO 27001 — _contributions welcome_

To add a whole framework, follow
[Framework packs](../contributing/framework-packs.md). For a single rule
inside an existing framework, follow
[Adding a single rule](../contributing/rule-packs.md).
